sentence: 长期处于高压状态对健康不好。
pinyin: Chánggī chǔyú gāoyā zhuàngtài duì jiànkāng bù hǎo.
english: Being under high pressure for a long time is bad for your health.

sentence: 这部电影获得了好几个奖项。
pinyin: Zhè bù diàn yǐng huò dé le hǎo jǐ gè jiǎng xiàng.
english: This film won quite a few awards.

sentence: 老师要求课堂上不能玩手机。
pinyin: Lǎoshī yāoqiú kè táng shàng bù néng wán shǒujī.
english: The teacher requires that phones not be used in class.

sentence: 她在门口贴了一张音乐会海报。
pinyin: Tā zài ménkǒu tiē le yī zhāng yīnyuèhuì hǎibào.
english: She put up a concert poster at the entrance.

sentence: 每天散步对身体很有益。
pinyin: Měi tiān sàn bù duì shēn tǐ hěn yǒu yì.
english: Taking a walk every day is very beneficial for your health.

meaning: 1. to contribute (as a gift); 2. to donate; 3. benefaction
sentence: 他向学校捐赠了一批书。
pinyin: Tā xiàng xuéxiào juānzèng le yī pī shū.
english: He donated a batch of books to the school.

sentence: 水果有很多种，比如说苹果和香蕉。
pinyin: Shuǐguǒ yǒu hěn duō zhǒng, bǐrú shuō píngguǒ hé xiāngjiāo.
english: There are many kinds of fruit, for example apples and bananas.

sentence: 星期天爸爸带孩子去动物园看熊猫。
pinyin: Xīngqītiān bàba dài háizi qù dòngwùyuán kàn xióngmāo.
english: On Sunday dad took the kids to the zoo to see the pandas.

meaning: 1. to add to existing facilities or services
sentence: 学校决定增设一门选修课。
pinyin: Xuéxiào juédìng zēngshè yī mén xuǎnxiū kè.
english: The school decided to add an elective course.

meaning: 1. meaning; 2. implication; 3. flavor; 4. overtone; 5. to mean; 6. to
sentence: 他的话意味着计划要改变了。
pinyin: Tā de huà yìwèizhe jìhuà yào gǎibiàn le.
english: His words imply that the plan is going to change.

sentence: 他下周要参加一场学术研讨会。
pinyin: Tā xià zhōu yào cānjiā yī chǎng xuéshù yántǎohuì.
english: He is attending an academic seminar next week.

sentence: 联合国宪章是国际关系的基础文件。
pinyin: Liánhéguó Xiànzhāng shì guójì guānxi de jīchǔ wénjiàn.
english: The United Nations Charter is a foundational document for international relations.

sentence: 请到一楼总台办理入住手续。
pinyin: Qǐng dào yī lóu zǒngtái bànlǐ rùzhù shǒuxù.
english: Please go to the front desk on the first floor to check in.

sentence: 这道等式两边必须相等。
pinyin: Zhè dào děngshì liǎng biān bìxū xiāngděng.
english: Both sides of this equation must be equal.

meaning: 1. to make an issue of sth; 2. to fuss; 3. to make a song and dance
sentence: 他总喜欢拿小事做文章，让人烦透了。
pinyin: Tā zǒng xǐhuān ná xiǎoshì zuò wénzhāng, ràng rén fán tòu le.
english: He always likes to make an issue out of small things, which drives everyone crazy.

sentence: 公司招募了一批年轻的科技人员来做研发。
pinyin: Gōngsī zhāomù le yī pī niánqīng de kējì rényuán lái zuò yánfā.
english: The company recruited a group of young technical staff for research and development.

sentence: 这款产品符合国际技术标准，可以出口。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chǎnpǐn fúhé guójì jìshù biāozhǔn, kěyǐ chūkǒu.
english: This product meets international technology standards and can be exported.

sentence: 她的演技已经达到国际级水平了。
pinyin: Tā de yǎnjì yǐjīng dádào guójì jí shuǐpíng le.
english: Her acting has already reached an international level.

sentence: 我们等了将近两个小时才上车。
pinyin: Wǒmen děngle jiāngjìn liǎng gè xiǎoshí cái shàngchē.
english: We waited almost two hours before boarding.

sentence: 把文件分好类，便于以后查找。
pinyin: Bǎ wénjiàn fēn hǎo lèi, biàn yú yǐhòu cházhǎo.
english: Sort the files properly to make it easier to find them later.

sentence: 发布消息前，大家要统一口径。
pinyin: Fābù xiāoxi qián, dàjiā yào tǒngyī kǒujìng.
english: Before releasing any information, everyone needs to get their story straight.

meaning: 1. doorstep; 2. sill; 3. threshold; 4. fig. knack or trick (esp. schem
sentence: 这个行业的入行门槛比较高。
pinyin: Zhège hángyè de rùháng ménkǎn bǐjiào gāo.
english: The entry threshold for this industry is relatively high.

sentence: 她把珠宝锁在抽屉里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zhūbǎo suǒ zài chōutì lǐ.
english: She keeps her jewelry locked in the drawer.

sentence: 今年的出口总量比去年增加了不少。
pinyin: Jīnnián de chūkǒu zǒngliàng bǐ qùnián zēngjiāle bùshǎo.
english: This year's total export volume increased considerably compared to last year.

meaning: 1. traffic accident; 2. car crash; 3. CL:場|场[cháng]
sentence: 昨晚高速路上发生了一起严重车祸。
pinyin: Zuó wǎn gāo sù lù shàng fā shēng le yī qǐ yán zhòng chē huò.
english: A serious car accident happened on the highway last night.

meaning: 1. to move; 2. to act; 3. action; 4. decision; 5. conduct; 6. manner
sentence: 政府出台了多项减税举措。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ chūtái le duō xiàng jiǎnshuì jǔ cuò.
english: The government introduced a number of tax reduction measures.

sentence: 街角新开了一家四川餐馆。
pinyin: Jiējiǎo xīn kāi le yī jiā Sìchuān cānguǎn.
english: A new Sichuan restaurant just opened on the corner.

sentence: 这个公式里有三个变量。
pinyin: Zhège gōngshì lǐ yǒu sān gè biànliàng.
english: There are three variables in this formula.

sentence: 这片湿地是候鸟的重要栖息地。
pinyin: Zhè piàn shīdì shì hòuniǎo de zhòngyào qīxīdì.
english: This wetland is an important habitat for migratory birds.

sentence: 洪水淹没了河边的低地。
pinyin: Hóngshuǐ yānmò le hé biān de dīdì.
english: The floodwaters submerged the lowlands by the river.

meaning: 1. to go onto the streets; 2. to go shopping
sentence: 周末我喜欢上街逛逛。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒ xǐhuān shàng jiē guàngguang.
english: On weekends I like to go out and walk around the shops.

sentence: 这个品牌专注于高端市场。
pinyin: Zhège pǐnpái zhuānzhù yú gāoduān shìchǎng.
english: This brand focuses on the high-end market.

sentence: 他们的意识形态差异很大。
pinyin: Tāmen de yìshi xíngtài chāyì hěn dà.
english: Their ideologies are very different.

meaning: 1. to talk with sb (face to face); 2. discussion; 3. talk; 4. chat
sentence: 两位教授今天进行了公开对谈。
pinyin: Liǎng wèi jiàoshòu jīntiān jìnxíngle gōngkāi duìtán.
english: Two professors held a public discussion today.

sentence: 她说找对象不一定要多金，性格好才重要。
pinyin: Tā shuō zhǎo duìxiàng bù yīdìng yào duō jīn, xìnggé hǎo cái zhòngyào.
english: She said a partner doesn't have to be wealthy — a good personality is what matters.

meaning: lit. to hang up a plate; to open up for business; listed (on stock mar
sentence: 新开的诊所今天正式挂牌营业了。
pinyin: Xīn kāi de zhěnsuǒ jīntiān zhèngshì guà pái yíngyè le.
english: The newly opened clinic officially opened for business today.

meaning: place (in numbered sequence); degree on employment scale
sentence: 这次考试他的位次比上学期提高了不少。
pinyin: Zhè cì kǎoshì tā de wèi cì bǐ shàng xuéqī tígāo le bù shǎo.
english: His ranking in this exam improved quite a bit compared to last semester.

meaning: to take office; to assume a post
sentence: 新校长下个月到任，大家都很期待。
pinyin: Xīn xiàozhǎng xià gè yuè dào rèn, dàjiā dōu hěn qīdài.
english: The new principal takes office next month, and everyone is looking forward to it.

sentence: 农场里养了几匹种马，专门用来配种。
pinyin: Nóngchǎng lǐ yǎng le jǐ pǐ zhǒng mǎ, zhuānmén yòng lái pèizhǒng.
english: The farm keeps a few stallions specifically for breeding.

meaning: privately run (i.e. by a company, not the state)
sentence: 这家医院是民营的，收费比公立医院高一些。
pinyin: Zhè jiā yīyuàn shì mín yíng de, shōufèi bǐ gōnglì yīyuàn gāo yīxiē.
english: This hospital is privately run, so its fees are a bit higher than public hospitals.

sentence: 下了雨，他仍旧骑自行车上班。
pinyin: Xià le yǔ, tā réng jiù qí zìxíngchē shàngbān.
english: Even though it rained, he still cycled to work as usual.

sentence: 这个项目正在公开招标。
pinyin: Zhège xiàngmù zhèngzài gōngkāi zhāobiāo.
english: This project is currently open for public bidding.

meaning: To have the courage to do sth
sentence: 你要敢于表达自己的想法。
pinyin: Nǐ yào gǎnyú biǎodá zìjǐ de xiǎngfǎ.
english: You need to have the courage to express your own ideas.

sentence: 警察腰间挂着一把手枪。
pinyin: Jǐngchá yāo jiān guàzhe yī bǎ shǒuqiāng.
english: The police officer had a pistol holstered at their waist.

meaning: 1. to be limited to; 2. to be confined to
sentence: 此优惠限于会员使用。
pinyin: Cǐ yōuhuì xiànyú huìyuán shǐyòng.
english: This discount is limited to members only.

sentence: 这款手机搭载了最新的芯片。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī dāzài le zuìxīn de xīnpiàn.
english: This phone is equipped with the latest chip.

meaning: (in an expression of the form 起到[qi3 dao4] + … + 作用[zuo4 yong4]) to ha
sentence: 多喝水能起到预防感冒的作用。
pinyin: Duō hē shuǐ néng qǐdào yùfáng gǎnmào de zuòyòng.
english: Drinking more water can help prevent colds.

meaning: vehicle number (license plate number, taxi number, bus number, train c
sentence: 请把你的车号告诉停车场工作人员。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ nǐ de chēhào gàosù tíngchēchǎng gōngzuò rényuán.
english: Please tell the parking lot staff your vehicle number.

sentence: 村里的民兵负责夜间巡逻。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de mínbīng fùzé yèjiān xúnluó.
english: The village militia is responsible for nightly patrols.

sentence: 这辆车装甲很厚，很安全。
pinyin: Zhè liàng chē zhuāngjiǎ hěn hòu, hěn ānquán.
english: This vehicle has thick armor and is very safe.
